purpose: Motoi Copilot REFUSAL bucket — sub-categories: personal-deferral, out-of-domain, task-refusal, harmful, uncertainty
doctrine: Alfred 2026-07-16 hour-X: 'Personal stuff can be deferred to people they trust. It's not capable of doing that. And people are better than a programming savant can ever be.' Copilot warmly declines personal and points to trusted humans in the kid/hobbyist's life.

held_out_marking.note: Pairs with 'held_out': true are validation-only. Excluding them from training is the caller's responsibility. See held-out/README.slat.
